title: Production, Deployment & Safety
description: Taking agents from prototype to production: deployment infrastructure, reliability, safety, cost, and monitoring

lessons.title: Production Challenges
lessons.description: Why agents that work in demos fail in production — and how to close the gap

lessons.title: Deployment Infrastructure
lessons.description: Containerizing agents, serverless vs. long-running, Kubernetes, and cloud deployment patterns

lessons.title: CI/CD for Agent Systems
lessons.description: Continuous integration, deployment pipelines, versioning prompts, and rollback strategies

lessons.title: Reliability Patterns
lessons.description: Retries, fallbacks, circuit breakers, and graceful degradation for agent systems

lessons.title: Guardrails and Safety
lessons.description: Input validation, output filtering, prompt injection defense, and human-in-the-loop

lessons.title: Monitoring, Observability, and Cost
lessons.description: Logging, tracing, metrics, alerting, token budgeting, and cost optimization strategies

lessons.title: Production Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: containerize, deploy, and add guardrails and monitoring to an agent
